strengths: 20 years of continuous engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — comfortably exceeds the 15-year minimum
Current role at re:cinq directly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework tooling, demonstrating hands-on AI builder fluency
Demonstrated external thought leadership through conference talks (FOSS4G 2019), multi-day workshops, and sustained open-source platform ownership (GISCollective)
concerns: No advanced degree in an AI-related field; education is a BS in Computer Science and a BA in Fine Arts/Photography — the preferred PhD or Master's in AI is absent
Career trajectory is consistently individual contributor at senior/staff level with no evidence of director-level IC scope, executive advisory work, or strategic customer engagement
AI involvement is recent (2025) and tooling-focused; no demonstrated record of building recognized AI-powered products or platforms at scale
response.justification: Bogdan is a technically capable and broadly experienced engineer with genuine AI-adjacent work in his current role, but the Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) position is a director-level IC role requiring demonstrated strategic advisory capability, executive-level influence, and recognized AI platform expertise — none of which appear in his profile. His AI engagement is real but very recent and practitioner-level rather than strategic. The gap between his current senior/staff IC trajectory and the scope demanded by this role is too large to bridge without a substantive track record of the advisory, visionary, and customer-facing responsibilities the job describes.
